gaps.description: src/index.js missing — package.json 'main' points to src/index.js which does not exist on disk
README documents default port as 3000 but bin/agentic-service.js defaults to 1234
ARCHITECTURE.md lines 191-252 contain massive stale CR content (repeated add-section instructions from prior milestones, never cleaned up)

ARCHITECTURE.md directory tree lists only 14 src/ files; 20 additional source files exist (embed.js, vad.js, profiler.js, latency-log.js, store/index.js, adapters/*, cli/*, tunnel.js, cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js)
Dead import maps #agentic-embed and #agentic-voice in package.json — no source file references them
Test pass rate ~94% (775/824) with ~49 failures across detector (16), server (18), CLI (2), milestones (6+7) — mostly stale mocks after refactoring
src/runtime/adapters/embed.js is a stub that throws 'not implemented' — actual embed uses vendor agentic-embed via src/runtime/embed.js, breaking the adapter pattern
M3: Visual perception — agentic-sense installed but sense adapter returns empty arrays (stub)
mDNS/Bonjour for .local hostname discovery — not implemented; only raw LAN IP display available
Docker deployment missing OLLAMA_HOST env var in docker-compose.yml — required for containerized Ollama connectivity
Docker deployment missing ./data volume mount in root docker-compose.yml
Server middleware (src/server/middleware.js) is a 4-line error handler — no request validation, rate limiting, or security middleware
